meta.purpose: Exact cluster certificate: witness lower bound on the open-band single-code list, reaching LARGE n at FIXED rho (no q^k enumeration).
meta.method: max #generators-in-plurality-ball over random + greedy + Lloyd + local-search constructions; cost O(t*n) per trial, independent of q^k.
meta.honesty: Every max_cert is a witness LOWER bound on Lambda(C,delta); bounded across large n at fixed rho supports P', growing would falsify it.
